case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPT OF HUMAN SER VS THOMPSON, ANITRA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPT OF HUMAN SER AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, ANITRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
